title: Kunlun Tech has designated 2026 as the Year of the World Model: Matrix-Game 3.5 can generate a 5B model in real-time on a single card, achieving 20FPS
excerpt: The world model track was officially added to the schedule of a Chinese company this year. At the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), Kouming
content_html:
The world model track was officially added to the schedule of a Chinese company this year. At the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), Kouming Wanwei's chairman Fang Han announced that 2026 is the Year of the World Model, and simultaneously launched three new products: Matrix-Game3.5 world model, Mureka v9.5, and O3 music model.

The most attention-grabbing one is Matrix-Game3.5. Kouming Wanwei has equipped this world model with patch-level memory injection capabilities, allowing the model to carry and access visual clip memories during generation, thereby pushing interaction to real-time. The performance numbers are impressive: a 5B parameter model can achieve a real-time generation speed of 20FPS on a single graphics card at 720p resolution. More importantly, its core architecture has been open-sourced, meaning developers working on games and embodied intelligence can directly download and try it out.

The two music models focus more on making AI creation into a clear tool form. Mureka v9.5 and O3 bring AI music to versioned creation, allowing users to iterate, compare, and choose between different versions, significantly enhancing the tool-like experience compared to previous generative approaches.

From real-time interaction of the world model to versioned management of music creation, Kouming Wanwei's release highlights define 2026 as the starting point for a model to truly understand and generate an interactive world.

content_html_zh:
今年，世界模特赛道正式加入中国企业赛程。 在2026世界人工智能大会（WAIC）上，口明万维董事长方瀚宣布2026年为世界模型年，并同步推出三款新品：Matrix-Game3.5世界模型、Mureka v9.5、O3音乐模型。

其中最引人注目的是Matrix-Game3.5。 口明万维为这个世界模型配备了补丁级内存注入能力，让模型在生成过程中携带和访问视觉片段内存，从而将交互推向实时。 性能数据令人印象深刻：5B参数模型可以在720p分辨率下在单显卡上实现20FPS的实时生成速度。 更重要的是，它的核心架构已经开源，这意味着从事游戏和体现智能的开发人员可以直接下载并试用。

两种音乐模式更注重让AI创作成为一种清晰的工具形式。 Mureka v9.5和O3将AI音乐带入版本化创作中，允许用户在不同版本之间迭代、比较和选择，与以前的生成方法相比，显着增强了类似工具的体验。

从世界模型的实时交互到音乐创作的版本化管理，口明万维的发布亮点将2026年定义为模型真正理解和生成交互世界的起点。
